content: We can reframe biological pathogens (biological agents from Topic B) as naturally evolved intrinsic curiosity module (ICM)-driven autonomous agents that explore new host environments to gain intrinsic 'reward' from novel, uncolonized niches, mirroring how 2025's ICM-augmented swarm UAVs seek out unknown target territories. This perspective frames pathogen transmissibility and mutation as the biological equivalent of updating ICM feature predictors to increase intrinsic reward from novel encounters.
